Web Application Testing

Your web applications are often the most exposed part of your organization. We find the bugs before the attackers do.

What It Covers

  • Custom web applications
  • REST and GraphQL APIs
  • Authentication and authorization
  • Session management
  • Data validation
  • Third-party integrations

Our Approach

We combine automated scanning with manual testing. We look for OWASP Top 10 issues, logic flaws, and business-specific vulnerabilities that scanners miss.

Deliverables

  • Detailed findings report
  • Reproduction steps for each finding
  • Remediation guidance
  • Executive summary
  • Retest option available

Typical Timeline

Web app tests vary widely based on complexity. A standard application takes 1-2 weeks. We'll provide an estimate upon scope review.

What You'll Need

  • URLs or access to staging/production
  • API documentation
  • Test accounts (as needed)
Request a Quote
